name: Ernie Carson
abstract: Ernie Carson (December 4, 1937 – January 9, 2012) was an American Dixieland jazz revival cornetist, pianist, and singer. He was born in Portland, Oregon.

concerts.label: Bob Greene's "World of Jelly Roll Morton"

about_quotes.speaker: Maxine Sullivan
about_quotes.evidence: Ernie Carson is a young cornetist from down that way, I don't know exactly where he's from but he's very good
